title: disperis renibractea
intro: Disperis renibractea, also known as the palmate or kidney-shaped Disperis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Disperis renibractea include its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it a popular remedy for treating coughs, colds, and sore throats. Herbal preparations of Disperis renibractea typically involve drying and processing the plant's leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
